name: rtime-review
description: Read-only review-console data surfaces for rtime assistant workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect audit, run-log, memory-candidate, and tooling review panels.
interface.longDescription: Rtime Review provides read-only review-console data surfaces for standards audit archives, runtime and context run logs, memory candidate counts, failed runs, permission audit summaries, and repository-owned tool health.
defaultPrompt: Summarize failed runs and memory candidates.
